translations.en: We’re having a picnic at the lake today.
translations.es: Hoy hacemos un picnic en el lago.
translations.de: Heute machen wir ein Picknick am See.
translations.it: Oggi facciamo un picnic al lago.
translations.ru: Сегодня мы устраиваем пикник у озера.
translations.pt: Hoje vamos fazer um piquenique no lago.
translations.he: היום אנחנו עושים פיקניק ליד האגם.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi đi dã ngoại ở hồ.
translations.nl: Vandaag gaan we picknicken bij het meer.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ми влаштовуємо пікнік біля озера.
translations.hi: आज हम झील के पास पिकनिक कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: I dag har vi piknik ved innsjøen.
translations.id: Hari ini kami piknik di danau.
translations.sv: Idag har vi picknick vid sjön.
translations.ro: Astăzi facem un picnic la lac.
translations.da: I dag har vi picnic ved søen.
translations.ja: 今日は湖でピクニックします。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; grammatically 3rd person singular, often meaning ‘we’ in colloquial French.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular agreeing with ‘on’; denotes the action of picnicking.
Contraction of the preposition ‘à’ and the masculine singular definite article ‘le’; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun (masculine singular); object of the preposition ‘au’, indicating the location.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; specifies the time of the action.

sentences.target: Tu peux me déposer près du lac.
sentences.reading: /ty pø mə de.po.ze pʁɛ dy lak/

translations.fr: Tu peux me déposer près du lac.
translations.ipa: /ty pø mə de.po.ze pʁɛ dy lak/
translations.en: Can you drop me off near the lake?
translations.de: Kannst du mich in der Nähe des Sees absetzen?
translations.zh-Hans: 你能在湖边把我放下吗？
translations.yue: 你可唔可以喺湖邊畀我落車？
translations.pt: Você pode me deixar perto do lago?
translations.vi: Bạn có thể thả tôi xuống gần hồ không?
translations.nl: Kun je me in de buurt van het meer afzetten?
translations.hu: Le tudnál tenni a tó közelében?
translations.hi: क्या आप मुझे झील के पास छोड़ सकते हैं?
translations.pl: Czy możesz mnie wysadzić w pobliżu jeziora?
translations.el: Μπορείς να με αφήσεις κοντά στη λίμνη?
translations.nb: Kan du sette meg av ved innsjøen?
translations.id: Bisakah kamu menurunkan aku di dekat danau?
translations.sv: Kan du släppa av mig vid sjön?
translations.ro: Poți să mă lași lângă lac?
translations.da: Kan du sætte mig af ved søen?
translations.ja: 湖の近くで降ろしてもらえますか？

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular of ‘pouvoir’; modal verb taking an infinitive complement, expressing ability/permission.
1st person singular clitic pronoun; direct object of the infinitive ‘déposer’, placed before the infinitive in a modal construction.
Infinitive lexical verb complement of ‘peux’; denotes the action of dropping someone/something off.
Adverb functioning as part of the complex prepositional expression ‘près de’; indicates proximity.
Contraction of the preposition ‘de’ and the masculine singular article ‘le’; introduces the noun complement of ‘près’.
Common noun (masculine singular); complement of the preposition ‘du’.

sentences.target: Il y a des canards sur le lac.
sentences.reading: /il i a de ka.naʁ syʁ lə lak/

translations.fr: Il y a des canards sur le lac.
translations.ipa: /il i a de ka.naʁ syʁ lə lak/
translations.en: There are ducks on the lake.
translations.de: Auf dem See gibt es Enten.
translations.nl: Er są̂ńe eenden op het meer.

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular pronoun used as an expletive/dummy subject in the existential construction ‘il y a’.
Clitic locative pronoun; part of the fixed existential expression ‘il y a’, contributing the sense of ‘there’.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of ‘avoir’; in ‘il y a’, functions as the existential verb meaning ‘there is/are’.
Indefinite plural article; determiner of the following noun phrase.
Common noun (plural); head of the noun phrase denoting what exists in the existential construction.
Preposition introducing a locative complement meaning ‘on/upon’.
Definite article (masculine singular); determiner of ‘lac’.
Common noun (masculine singular); object of the preposition ‘sur’, indicating location.

sentences.target: Nous louons un kayak au lac.

translations.fr: Nous louons un kayak au lac.
translations.en: We’re renting a kayak at the lake.
translations.es: Estamos alquilando un kayak en el lago.
translations.de: Wir mieten am See ein Kajak.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在湖边租一艘皮划艇。
translations.yue: 我哋喺湖邊租一隻皮艇。
translations.pt: Estamos alugando um caiaque no lago.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang thuê một chiếc kayak ở hồ.
translations.nl: We huren een kajak bij het meer.
translations.hi: हम झील के पास एक कयाक किराए पर ले रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi leier en kajakk ved innsjøen.
translations.id: Kami menyewa sebuah kayak di danau.
translations.sv: Vi hyr en kajak vid sjön.
translations.da: Vi lejer en kajak ved søen.
translations.ja: 私たちは湖でカヤックを借りています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Present indicative, 1st person plural of ‘louer’; main lexical verb meaning to rent/hire.
Indefinite article (masculine singular); determiner of ‘kayak’.
Common noun; direct object of the verb ‘louons’.
Contraction of ‘à’ + ‘le’; introduces a locative complement indicating where the renting takes place or destination.
Common noun (masculine singular); complement of the preposition ‘au’.
